FR-01.title: Project Registration and Setup
requirements: Implement complete project registration and setup functionality
All project registration and setup operations must be validated and authorized
System shall maintain audit log for project registration and setup actions

acceptance_criteria: User can successfully perform all project registration and setup operations
System validates all project registration and setup inputs correctly
Error messages display clearly for project registration and setup failures
project registration and setup data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build Project Registration and Setup API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for project registration and setup feature in Construction Project Management. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Project Registration and Setup UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for project registration and setup. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Write Project Registration and Setup Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit and integration tests for project registration and setup feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
